messages.content:
Candidate List: {(1,3), (1,5), (1,6), (1,7), (2,6), (3,1), (3,5), (4,2), (4,7), (4,8), (6,4), (7,2), (7,6), (7,8), (8,1)}

Logic:
The initial observation is that I am at a location with a "plant" and paths available in all four directions [N, E, S, W]. I searched the global map for all coordinates matching these criteria. The resulting candidates are (1,3), (1,5), (1,6), (1,7), (2,6), (3,1), (3,5), (4,2), (4,7), (4,8), (6,4), (7,2), (7,6), (7,8), and (8,1). To narrow this list, I will move North.

[ACTION: move-N]

Candidate List: {(1,8), (3,2), (8,2)}

Logic:
I moved N. 
If I was at (1,3), I am now at (1,4). (1,4) has a desk. Observation: trashcan. Eliminate (1,3).
If I was at (1,5), I am now at (1,6). (1,6) has a plant. Observation: trashcan. Eliminate (1,5).
If I was at (1,6), I am now at (1,7). (1,7) has a plant. Observation: trashcan. Eliminate (1,6).
If I was at (1,7), I am now at (1,8). (1,8) has a trashcan and paths [N, E, S, W]. Matches.
If I was at (2,6), I am now at (2,7). (2,7) has a desk. Observation: trashcan. Eliminate (2,6).
If I was at (3,1), I am now at (3,2). (3,2) has a trashcan and paths [N, E, S, W]. Matches.
If I was at (3,5), I am now at (3,6). (3,6) has none. Observation: trashcan. Eliminate (3,5).
If I was at (4,2), I am now at (4,3). (4,3) has none. Observation: trashcan. Eliminate (4,2).
If I was at (4,7), I am now at (4,8). (4,8) has a plant. Observation: trashcan. Eliminate (4,7).
If I was at (4,8), I am now at (4,9). (4,9) has none. Observation: trashcan. Eliminate (4,8).
If I was at (6,4), I am now at (6,5). (6,5) has a plant. Observation: trashcan. Eliminate (6,4).
If I was at (7,2), I am now at (7,3). (7,3) has none. Observation: trashcan. Eliminate (7,2).
If I was at (7,6), I am now at (7,7). (7,7) has a plant. Observation: trashcan. Eliminate (7,6).
If I was at (7,8), I am now at (7,9). (7,9) has a plant. Observation: trashcan. Eliminate (7,8).
If I was at (8,1), I am now at (8,2). (8,2) has a trashcan and paths [N, E, S, W]. Matches.

The candidates for my current position are (1,8), (3,2), and (8,2). To differentiate these, I will move East.

[ACTION: move-E]

Candidate List: {(2,8)}

Logic:
I moved E.
If I was at (1,8), I am now at (2,8). (2,8) has a desk and paths [N, E, S, W]. Matches.
If I was at (3,2), I am now at (4,2). (4,2) has a plant. Observation: desk. Eliminate (3,2).
If I was at (8,2), I am now at (8,3). (8,3) has none. Observation: desk. Eliminate (8,2).

Exactly one candidate remains: (2,8).

[ACTION: localize(2,8)]
Episode Terminated. Guess: localize(2,8). True State: (2,8).
